releases.title: Countdown Improvements
features: Countdowns longer than 48 hours now show days (e.g. 3d 04h 22m 10s)

releases.title: Bug Fixes
features: Schedule view now refreshes correctly when switching tabs
Season auto-selects the most recent season even when no results are recorded yet

releases.title: Push Notifications & PWA
features: Install the app to your home screen for a native app experience
Schedule stays available offline after the first visit
Subscribe to individual games with the bell icon
Receive final score alerts when games end — even with the app closed
Background score polling keeps results current automatically
